zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet Sutherland of Sutherland於1394年出生在英國蘇格蘭薩瑟蘭格爾斯皮時，她的父親Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland47歲，母親Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan21歲。她和Hugh Ross 4th of Balnagowan, 9th of Clan Ross至少有4個兒子。她去世於1450年在英國蘇格蘭洛-爾享年56歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janet Sutherland of Sutherland于1394年出生在英国苏格兰薩瑟蘭格爾斯皮时，她的父亲Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland47岁，母亲Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan21岁。她和Hugh Ross 4th of Balnagowan, 9th of Clan Ross至少有4个儿子。她去世于1450年在英国苏格兰洛-爾享年56岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Sutherland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Caithness): habitational name from the Scottish county of Sutherland, named with Old Norse súthr ‘south, southern’ + land ‘land’ because the territory lay south of Scandinavia and the Norse colonies in the Orkney and Shetland Islands.
History: This is the name of a Highland Scottish clan associated with the county of Sutherland.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet Sutherland of Sutherland was born in 1394, in Golspie, Sutherland, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland, was 47 and her mother, Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan, was 21. She had at least 4 sons with Hugh Ross 4th of Balnagowan, 9th of Clan Ross. She died in 1450, in Ross-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 56, and was buried in Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet Sutherland of Sutherland est née en 1394, à Golspie, Sutherland, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan, avait 21 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils avec Hugh Ross 4th of Balnagowan, 9th of Clan Ross. Elle est décédée en 1450, à Ross-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janet Sutherland of Sutherland 1394 in Golspie, Sutherland, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland 47 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan 21. Sie hatte mit Hugh Ross 4th of Balnagowan, 9th of Clan Ross mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1450 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Ross-shire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Sutherland of Sutherland è nata il nel 1394 nel Golspie, Sutherland, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan, aveva 21 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli con Hugh Ross 4th of Balnagowan, 9th of Clan Ross. Morì nel 1450, nel Ross-shire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Sutherland of Sutherlandが1394年にイギリススコットランドススエルランドゴルスパで生まれた時，父Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherlandは47歳，母Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchanは21歳であった。彼女はHugh Ross 4th of Balnagowan, 9th of Clan Rossとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1450年にイギリススコットランドロス-シュアイアで56歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Sutherland of Sutherland(이)가 1394년 영국 스코틀랜드 서덜랜드 골스피에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 Hugh Ross 4th of Balnagowan, 9th of Clan Ross(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1450년 영국 스코틀랜드 로스-실르에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Sutherland of Sutherland nasceu em 1394, em Golspie, Sutherland, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan, tinha 21 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Hugh Ross 4th of Balnagowan, 9th of Clan Ross. Ela faleceu em 1450, em Ross-shire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet Sutherland of Sutherland родилась в 1394 г. в местности голспи, сутирланд, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan, 21. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына от Hugh Ross 4th of Balnagowan, 9th of Clan Ross. Она умерла в 1450 г. в местности росс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Janet Sutherland of Sutherland nació en 1394, en Golspie, Sutherland, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con Hugh Ross 4th of Balnagowan, 9th of Clan Ross. Murió en 1450, en Ross-shire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en Escocia, Reino Unido.
